title: Coulson will use CAREER award to reinvent how machines learn to control
summary_en: Next-generation technologies—including self-driving vehicles, intelligent robots, personalized healthcare devices, and smart infrastructure—are already reshaping industries and becoming increasingly woven into daily life. But to be successful, these advances, and many others, need safe, reliable and…
title_cn: 科尔森将利用CAREER奖革新机器学习控制方法
